title: 10 Herbal Teas For Viral Hepatitis
description: Cinchona officinalis teas contains compounds like quinine, quinidine, and cinchonine. These alkaloids help reduce inflammation and improve liver function in people with viral hepatitis. Quinine, in particular, has anti-viral properties that target the hepatitis virus, reducing its replication and the severity of symptoms.
